title: MAGMA DIVER IS THE WORST EPISODE EVER
display_title: MAGMA DIVER IS THE WORST EPISODE EVER
wikitext:
[]: MAGMA DIVER IS THE WORST EPISODE EVER. Post by 8777778 » Tue May 26, 2009 9:30 am The episode known as Magma Diver, was the events ever covered in the manga? Thanks for the help :)

[]: Post by BattleMonkey » Tue May 26, 2009 9:48 am nope

[]: Post by rberlin » Wed May 27, 2009 2:51 pm It didn't have enough Rei.

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Wed May 27, 2009 3:37 pm Sadamoto deemed it unnecessary.

[]: Post by Reichu » Wed May 27, 2009 4:07 pm And we're done, I think.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri May 29, 2009 3:16 pm MAGMA DIVER IS THE WORST EPISODE EVER. Discuss.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Fri May 29, 2009 3:41 pm The worst episode is "Shinji Masturbates at His Own Funeral".

[]: Post by backseatjesus » Fri May 29, 2009 4:31 pm Recap episode is the worse.

[]: Post by xtr00kvltcorex » Fri May 29, 2009 4:33 pm Jet Alone episode is by far the worst and most pointless.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 29, 2009 4:54 pm Edit: Ignore this post.

[]: Post by ZapX » Fri May 29, 2009 5:27 pm PRPD...really, man...I mean...

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri May 29, 2009 5:43 pm Yeeeaaaah........ I should just think twice before making certain posts...

[]: Post by Oedipusfoot » Fri May 29, 2009 5:49 pm I was wondering when the monkey would make his next appearance. By the way, Magma Diver wasn't even an episode in Evangelion.

[]: Post by DummyPlug » Fri May 29, 2009 6:17 pm I liked the ending though. I mean the ending of the dive, where Asuka seems to open up a little bit to Shinji for once.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri May 29, 2009 7:02 pm Personally I think in terms of "worst" episode is either 7 or 13 in terms of how "boring" they are, but even the boring episodes have really good things about them. 7: Misato and Shinji relationship building. 13: Background given to Ritsuko, some subtle hints to things we see in 21' and 25'... tl;dr for those of you with short attention spans: Episode 10 was "fine just fine" imo.

[]: Post by BattleMonkey » Fri May 29, 2009 9:44 pm Fighting the angels with the power of programming! Was the most god awful episode. Magma diver didn't add much to the overall storyline, but it had lot of fun stuff in it.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Fri May 29, 2009 9:49 pm I thought it was ok but nothing special. I seen a lot worst episodes though.

[]: Post by Timstuff » Fri May 29, 2009 11:50 pm I don't think I can honestly say that Magma Diver was the worst episode, because there was too much stuff in it that I loved. It's mostly Asuka / Shinji fanservice, but I'm an Asuka fan so that's fine with me.

[]: Post by drinian » Fri May 29, 2009 11:53 pm BattleMonkey wrote: Fighting the angels with the power of programming! Was the most god awful episode.

[]: Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat May 30, 2009 12:46 am Jet Alone episode was much worst though. He might be the useless anime character ever.
